title: Billing
description: Free plan with credit top-ups for AI features. Card details stay with Stripe.

usage.heading: Usage
usage.description: Your free plan and interview-prep credits. Top up when you need paid AI features.
usage.freeHint: No subscription required. Buy credits for AI features that cost money.
usage.stripeNotConfigured: Credit top-ups are not configured on this environment yet.
usage.packsUnavailable: No credit packs are available right now.

payment.heading: Payment method
payment.description: Cards are collected and stored by Stripe — MockMatch only sees last four digits for display.
payment.pciNote: We never store full card numbers or CVC on MockMatch servers (PCI SAQ A).
payment.emptyDescription: Add a payment method in Stripe’s secure portal, or buy credits — Checkout will collect the card safely.
payment.name: Name

history.heading: Billing history
history.description: Receipts for credit top-ups and other Stripe charges.
history.empty: No invoices yet. Top up credits to see history here.
